name: signalk-dmi
description: Signal K plugin that ingests DMI (Danish Meteorological Institute) free open data — HARMONIE forecasts, met observations, WAM waves, DKSS ocean (sea level, current, water temperature) — into Signal K paths and the v2 Weather API. Authoritative Danish met/ocean data for vessels in Danish and adjacent waters.
author: Dennis Milton <dmtamsen@gmail.com>
